message:
style(packs/kubernetes): rustfmt the helm/kustomize tests modules

Pure cargo-fmt cleanup that was missed when the per-pattern coverage
landed in acad49b/0d2dec7. Two unrelated mechanical fixes, consistent
with 3403bf1 and e4e21de:

- helm.rs: alphabetize the tests-mod use list so `Severity` comes
  before `test_helpers::*` (matches infra packs and now kubectl, which
  was already swept).
- kustomize.rs: same use-list swap, plus rustfmt collapsed several
  short three-arg `assert_blocks(...)` and `assert_allows(...)` calls
  back onto a single line — they fit within the 100-col width and the
  multi-line form was a lint trip.

No assertion text or pattern coverage changed; the pre/post test
behavior is byte-identical at runtime.
